description: Boolean behavior specification for accuracy category. Evaluator parses spec_json + execution_log + query to return boolean state per field. Consolidated to 3 headers × 3 criteria (9 total).

behavior_matches_claim.description: Agent's implementation correctly realizes the behavior specified in the dispatch brief claim

seam_crossed_in_real_usage_path.description: Agent traced the actual code path through the seam in a real usage invocation

only_boundary_files_modified.description: Only files within the declared write boundary were modified

contract_signatures_unchanged.description: Function signatures, API contracts, and data schemas preserved exactly as before
contract_signatures_unchanged.check: signature_diff == empty AND api_contract_diff == empty AND schema_diff == empty

red_tests_fail_before_implementation.description: Failing red tests existed for the claim and failed for the right reason before implementation

all_new_tests_pass.description: All new tests authored for the claim pass after implementation

no_silent_contract_change.description: Agent did not silently change contract to accommodate implementation

mocked_seam_not_claimed_as_integration.description: Agent did not claim integration complete when seam was mocked

false_positive_risk_assessed.description: Agent performed adversarial self-check to identify false-positive risk
